title: Autoencoders Path
description: Build fluency in Autoencoders inside Generative Models by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Variational Autoencoders (VAE)
steps.summary: Variational Autoencoders (VAE) belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Generative Models / Autoencoders. Start after Variational Autoencoders and VAE. It opens into Categorical Variational Autoencoders (C-VAE) and Categorical Variational Autoencoders (C-VAE) Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Variational Autoencoders
steps.summary: Variational Autoencoders belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Generative Models / Autoencoders. Start after Autoencoders. It opens into Variational Autoencoders (VAE) and Variational Autoencoders (VAEs).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Variational Autoencoders (VAEs)
steps.summary: Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Generative Models / Autoencoders. Start after Variational Autoencoders and Autoencoders. It opens into Vector Quantization Variational Autoencoders (VQ-VAEs) Variants.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
